comment: We need role-based permissions because managing access across large teams is risky right now. Admin control is not granular enough.
user_story: As an admin, I want to define granular roles and permissions so that users only access what they are allowed to.

comment: Permission management is too basic. We can’t assign different access levels to different team members.
user_story: As an admin, I want to define granular roles and permissions so that users only access what they are allowed to.

comment: We need more advanced user roles. Right now everyone has too many permissions by default.
user_story: As an admin, I want to define granular roles and permissions so that users only access what they are allowed to.

comment: The search feature is frustrating. It’s hard to find old tasks, especially in large projects.
user_story: As a project manager, I want to quickly find tasks using an efficient search with filters so that I don’t waste time navigating large projects.

comment: Search needs better filtering options. We can’t easily locate tasks by status or date.
user_story: As a project manager, I want to quickly find tasks using an efficient search with filters so that I don’t waste time navigating large projects.

comment: Finding information is too slow. The search tool doesn’t return relevant results most of the time.
user_story: As a project manager, I want to quickly find tasks using an efficient search with filters so that I don’t waste time navigating large projects.

comment: The app has performance issues when handling large projects. It becomes slow and unresponsive.
user_story: As a user managing large projects, I want the application to remain fast and responsive so that I can work efficiently without delays.

comment: We experience major slowdowns when there are too many tasks loaded at once.
user_story: As a user managing large projects, I want the application to remain fast and responsive so that I can work efficiently without delays.

comment: The platform lags a lot during heavy usage. Performance needs serious improvement.
user_story: As a user managing large projects, I want the application to remain fast and responsive so that I can work efficiently without delays.

comment: The onboarding experience is confusing. It takes too long to understand how to set up projects.
user_story: As a new user, I want a clear and guided onboarding experience so that I can quickly understand how to use the platform.

comment: Getting started is not intuitive. We struggled to understand the workflow at the beginning.
user_story: As a new user, I want a clear and guided onboarding experience so that I can quickly understand how to use the platform.

comment: The onboarding process lacks guidance. New users don’t know what to do first.
user_story: As a new user, I want a clear and guided onboarding experience so that I can quickly understand how to use the platform.
